name: Musashi

skills.name: Niten Ichiryuu
skills.description: Using skills generates Vigor, which is consumed by Basic Attacks to gain enhancement effects. Hitting an enemy reduces the cooldown of Skills 1 and Skills 2. Vigor can stack up to two times. 1 Vigor: Enhances Basic Attack damage. 2 Vigor: Dashes and slows enemies.

skills.name: Illuminating Slash
skills.description: Unleashes sword energy in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in its path and knocking down projectiles. Becomes immune to crowd control when using the skill.

skills.name: Extreme Speed
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage and gaining a shield upon hitting an enemy.

skills.name: Duel to the Death
skills.description: Dashes to the target, launching them and dealing damage to enemies within range, while delaying the target's recovery effects.

tips: Musashi (Assassin): Tier A on international ranked — 50.72% WR.
Build core: Relentless Blade, Boots of Tranquility, Meteor.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 50.72%, pick 1.05%, ban 0.2%, popularity tier A.
Counters Diaochan, Luna, Shangguan · Weak into Dyadia, Sun Bin.

faqs.question: Is Musashi good in current season?
faqs.answer: Musashi is Tier A Assassin with 50.72% win rate, 1.05% pick rate, and 0.2% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Musashi build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Relentless Blade, Boots of Tranquility, Meteor, Axe of Torment, Rapacious Bite, Nettle Gauntlet. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Musashi?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Musashi: Dyadia, Sun Bin. Musashi is strong into Diaochan, Luna, Shangguan.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Diaochan, Luna, Shangguan. Countered by: Dyadia, Sun Bin.
